name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.72 Routine and project completion views
label: Routine and project completion views
release_notes: Adds weekly routine completion to Dashboard and Routines, project completion summaries to Projects, Google Tasks status chips for steps/activities, and a setting for week start day.
notes: Dashboard Stability tile shows routine completion for the current week
Routines tab shows weekly completion progress for the selected routine
Projects tab shows project checklist completion progress
Project steps and routine activities show Google Tasks status chips
Settings includes Week starts on with Monday as default
